mapper.insert: INSERT INTO net_worth_snapshot ( user_id, family_id, snapshot_date, total_assets, total_liabilities, net_worth, cash_balance, position_value, realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, income_pnl, fetch_date, is_dirty, dirty_from_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{familyId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{totalAssets}, #{totalLiabilities}, #{netWorth}, #{cashBalance}, #{positionValue}, #{realizedPnl}, #{unrealizedPnl}, #{incomePnl}, #{fetchDate}, #{isDirty}, #{dirtyFromDate}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE family_id = VALUES(family_id), total_assets = VALUES(total_assets), total_liabilities = VALUES(total_liabilities), net_worth = VALUES(net_worth), cash_balance = VALUES(cash_balance), position_value = VALUES(position_value), realized_pnl = VALUES(realized_pnl), unrealized_pnl = VALUES(unrealized_pnl), income_pnl = VALUES(income_pnl), fetch_date = VALUES(fetch_date), is_dirty = VALUES(is_dirty), dirty_from_date = VALUES(dirty_from_date), updated_at = NOW()
